symphony.title: Symphony
symphony.blurb: Load paths you can read. A housing that survived vibration without hiding how it works.

beyond.title: Beyond
beyond.blurb: From flat pattern to assembly: tolerances that kept the build right from the first construction.

northline.title: Northline
northline.blurb: Motion where friction and wear were designed in—not patched at the end.

cafeMeridian.title: Café Meridian
cafeMeridian.blurb: Thermal paths and limits defined before metal met the real environment.

bunero.title: Bunero
bunero.blurb: Surface and material choices that stood up to contact, cleaning, and real use.

castroCapital.title: Castro Capital
castroCapital.blurb: Documentation that stayed solid when the program changed—with a revision history you could trust.
